query:
SELECT os.omadaSiteId, os.omadaSiteName, os.customerExternalId, os.matchType, os.wanIp, os.wanStatus, os.deviceCount, os.clientCount
FROM omada_sites os;

SELECT externalId, name, businessName 
FROM customers 
WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%caravan%' OR LOWER(businessName) LIKE '%caravan%'
   OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%dj steel%' OR LOWER(businessName) LIKE '%dj steel%'
   OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%jess%' OR LOWER(businessName) LIKE '%jess%'
   OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%nicki%' OR LOWER(businessName) LIKE '%nicki%'
   OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%security screen%' OR LOWER(businessName) LIKE '%security screen%'
LIMIT 20;

SELECT externalId, name, businessName 
FROM customers 
WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%caravan%' OR LOWER(businessName) LIKE '%caravan%'
   OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%dj steel%' OR LOWER(businessName) LIKE '%dj steel%'
   OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%jess%' OR LOWER(businessName) LIKE '%jess%'
   OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%nicki%' OR LOWER(businessName) LIKE '%nicki%'
   OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%security screen%' OR LOWER(businessName) LIKE '%security screen%'
LIMIT 20;
